posts.author: Sarah_72724 (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Feature Request: Custom View Colours and Emoji Support

It would be great to have more customisation options for view tabs, specifically:

Custom View Colours: the ability to assign a background or label colour to a view (similar to colouring a sheet tab in Excel). This would make it much easier to visually distinguish between different saved views.

Emoji Support in View Names: allowing emojis in view titles would help users quickly identify and personalise their workspace.

These enhancements would make navigating multiple views more intuitive and visually organised.

What are you trying to achieve

These enhancements would make navigating multiple views more intuitive and visually organised.
